text.title: Alert Noise Budget — Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the weekly budget-report shape and the tuning-action record. Agent / SRE running the budget review must satisfy this contract.

forbidden.pattern: tuning_action_type = "added-filter" / "muted-in-slack" / "ignored" — none of these are valid in-platform actions
status=within-budget while actual events > budget thresholds (math wrong or actionable flags inflated)
over-budget service with no top_offenders proposed action (review ran but no decision)
tuning_action_type=add-new-alert when service is over budget (must retire/tune first per r3)
actionable_flag value missing for any alert event in the window (data quality failure)

allowed-transformations.transformation: Aggregate identical alert events that fire in rapid succession (within 5 min) into a single budget event (flap dampening).
Mark scheduled-maintenance alerts as out-of-budget (does not count) if maintenance window was pre-declared.
Roll up alerts from sub-services into the parent service budget IF the sub-service ownership is the same team.

section.title: Self-check (run at end of weekly review)

list.item: Every service has a budget configured (r1)
Every alert event in the window has an actionable flag (r2)
Every over-budget service has at least one tuning action recorded this week (r3)
No tuning action this week added a NEW alert to an over-budget service (r3)
Default-to-delete bias documented: count of deletions / total tuning actions logged
Chronic-breach services have escalation record with date + recipient (r5)
